prompt: I've got this rough draft of a design spec I'm writing for a new feature. Can you help me turn it into a proper spec? Here's what I have: [rough caching notes]

assertions.name: has_opening_summary
assertions.description: Spec starts with 1-2 paragraph executive summary of what the feature is and why it matters

assertions.name: has_clear_structure
assertions.description: Content is organized into logical sections with clear headers (not just a wall of text)

assertions.name: addresses_key_questions
assertions.description: Spec addresses the main open questions: where to place caching, cache policies, invalidation strategy, backwards compatibility

assertions.name: concise_language
assertions.description: Uses direct, concise language without filler phrases like 'we need to think about' or 'should probably'
